_comment: UpdateManager reads this file (path set by AppConfig.trusted_publishers_path)
during update import to verify the signing certificate beyond the Windows trust store.
Format: a JSON array of objects, each with a 'thumbprint' (SHA-256 hex, colon-separated)
and a 'subject' (human-readable label for log messages).
DEPLOYMENT PREREQUISITE: this list ships intentionally empty.
An empty list causes all update imports to fail signature verification, which is the
safe default — no unsigned or unrecognised packages can be installed.
Before deploying to production, add the SHA-256 thumbprint of your Authenticode
SECURITY NOTE: this file is shipped with the installer and must not be writable
by unprivileged users after installation. The installer places it in the install
folder (Program Files) which is ACL-protected on Windows.
